tweets.name: Garry Tan
tweets.text:
This is all open source, and you can host it all yourself. 

As I build more things (handling photos, PDFs, more integrations) you'll get all of them as I go. 

GBrain will ping you when new features drop and ask you if you want them in your claw daily.

https://t.co/yFpFU4pn5b

tweets.name: Garry Tan
tweets.text:
PS I'm now working on a branch of GBrain that will allow you to get this whole functionality for your OpenClaw or Hermes Agent. 

This is what I mean by markdown is code. It will remember and create a tutorial that YOUR claw will use to implement it like I did, but for YOU and https://t.co/4xrMYOo37U

tweets.name: Garry Tan
tweets.text:
GBrain is useful for anyone who has more people or projects or ideas than can fit in a normal human brain 🧠 

And the thing with OpenClaw is that now those ideas can have electric hands 🙌

tweets.name: Garry Tan
tweets.text:
